title: 6 ssh and rsync Commands for Faster Remote Deploys
summary: Ship remote updates with less friction using ssh and rsync commands for previewing changes, syncing releases, restarting services, and checking hosts after deploys.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with ssh and rsync

verification_setup: Confirm ssh and rsync are installed.
Replace the example hosts, usernames, ports, paths, and service names before running the commands.
Verify SSH access and remote permissions in a safe environment.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/ssh_and_rsync_commands_for_faster_remote_deploys.sh against a reachable remote environment.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example hosts, ports, paths, and service names with a reachable SSH target, and test rsync --delete in a safe environment first.
